steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills “thematic ______” in a sentence that contrasts Hawaiian literature’s heterogeneity with something it also has. The colon after the blank introduces the explanation: scholars link modern writers like Pukui and Pak to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories. The blank must name whatever that linking demonstrates — a sustained connection across time.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — subtlety: means delicacy or understatedness. Scholars drawing links across generations is not evidence of subtlety. ✗
  • Choice B — sophistication: means complexity or refinement. The colon-evidence describes a historical thread, not sophistication. ✗
  • Choice C — continuity: means an unbroken connection over time. Scholars tracing modern works back to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories is exactly continuity — the same themes persist across generations. ✓
  • Choice D — innovation: means newness or novelty — the opposite of linkage to tradition. ✗
That is the correct answer.
